audit_result.proof_trace: The streamBlobBatch function serves all blobs in the requested range without checking if blob epoch < FULU_FORK_EPOCH. MaxBlobsForEpoch() is used only for iteration count, not filtering. No epoch-based guard exists in blobSidecarsByRangeRPCHandler or validateBlobsByRange to enforce the transition boundary.
audit_result.attack_scenario: During transition near FULU_FORK_EPOCH, a peer requests blob_sidecars_by_range with a range spanning the fork boundary. The handler serves blobs from both pre-Fulu and post-Fulu epochs without filtering, violating the protocol requirement that only pre-Fulu blobs should be served via this RPC after the fork.

PROP-6a4369e9-inv-029.text: During transition, blob_sidecars_by_range must serve only pre-Fulu epoch blobs.
PROP-6a4369e9-inv-029.assertion: forall sidecar in transition_resp: compute_epoch(sidecar.slot) < FULU_FORK_EPOCH
